{{CargoRelic
|name=Requiem
|class_id=20620
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=05-22
|source=
|description=On May 22, 1792 AD, Mozart's Requiem was finally completed by his assistant Sussmayr.<br>Mozart's dying wish was finally fulfilled. Previously, a mysterious man had asked him to create a music piece. Mozart had an ominous feeling. He felt that the man was Grim Reaper who came from the underworld and Requiem would be his last creation. The ill-stricken Mozart felt that he would be dying soon and did not want to leave the world with his work unfinished. Unfortunately, this piece had to be completed by Sussmayr.
|fame=29
|art=44
|fth=30
|civ=20
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +2<br>Demon Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +4<br>Demon Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Demon Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +10<br>Demon Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Demon Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +10<br>Demon Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill I.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: ART Checks -5
}}
